title: [codereview-pass2] add_route only mutates local HashMap; no delegation or sync to RoutingTable after DAO rebuild
description: Gateway::add_route:91 does self.routes.insert but never updates or reads from dao_manager.routing_table. When DAO path changes the RoutingTable in handle_frame_rpl:316, the Gateway map stays stale. P0 correctness for local_mesh classification. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-fy9q
close_reason: Fixed add_route delegation to RoutingTable for DAO rebuild sync; coap/rpl init/providers/hash/vectors addressed per CCP spec; style match; gates clean
